tagList.content: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 2 hours

noteList.text: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 2 hours
Book worry-free. What you see is what you pay.
1 piece per person, 7 kg per piece.
Each piece cannot exceed 40 × 30 × 20 cm in size.

dataList.timeText: After departure or within 24 hours before departure

title.text: $272.50 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made more than 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. $273.40 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made within 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment.

dataList.timeText: After departure or within 24 hours before departure

noteList.text: When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: $80.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made more than 14814 hour(s) and 48 minute(s) before the departure of the first segment. If made between 14814 hour(s) and 48 minute(s) and 720 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment, changes within the same class are $106.70 per adult ticket. If made between 720 hour(s) and 360 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment, date/time changes within the same class are $133.30 per adult ticket. If made between 360 hour(s) and 168 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment, date/time changes within the same class are $160.00 per adult ticket. If made between 168 hour(s) and 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment, date/time changes within the same class are $186.70 per adult ticket. $213.30 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made less than 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged.

noteList.text: If your flight is changed due to external factors (for example, if your flight is delayed or canceled) and you need to change your flight, please refer to the latest airline policies.

Change fees (within the same class) are charged when passengers apply for ticket changes voluntarily, and are only valid for ticket changes within the same class. These fees are airline fees and are not charged by Trip.com. Flight ticket changes may also incur additional charges due to differences in plane ticket prices.

The ticket policy is subject to the rules listed below, and these might differ from policies listed on the airline's website. Any cancellation or change requests must be made through Trip.com platforms or to our customer support.

flagInfoList.content: Each airline has different regulations on special baggage (such as musical instruments and sports equipment). Therefore, for baggage other than regular backpacks and suitcases, we recommend checking the baggage regulations on the airline's website or contacting our customer support before traveling.

tagList.content: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 2 hours

descriptionList: Each passenger can make one free cancellation, if they cancel their ticket before the first flight segment departs. For more details, check the Terms & Conditions below.

Each passenger can change their ticket once without paying any change fees if they change it before the first flight segment departs. The fare difference between the new and original tickets is not covered.

noticeList.notice: Valid before departure of the first flight. Not transferable to changed flights.

displayPolicyList.content: With TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, you will get 100% of your ticket price refunded when canceling your flight before the departure of the first flight of your booking. Without TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, the cancellation policy is as follows:
displayPolicyList.title: TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change added

displayPolicyList.content: With TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, change fees and service fees will be covered when changing your flight before the departure of the first flight of your booking. Please note that any price difference resulting from the flight change will be at the passenger's expense. Without TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, the change policy is as follows:
displayPolicyList.title: TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change added

benefitProductList.title: Free cancellation
descriptionList: Each passenger can make one free cancellation, if they cancel their ticket before the first flight segment departs. For more details, check the Terms & Conditions below.

benefitProductList.title: No change fees
descriptionList: Each passenger can change their ticket once without paying any change fees if they change it before the first flight segment departs. The fare difference between the new and original tickets is not covered.

benefitProductList.title: Phone calls for flight updates
descriptionList: Receive real-time phone call alerts and expert assistance in the event of flight updates

benefitProductList.title: Booking confirmation via email or SMS
benefitProductList.description: We'll keep you updated about your itinerary's status with email or SMS notifications, just when you need them
descriptionList: Well keep you updated about your itinerarys status with email or SMS notifications, just when you need them

benefitProductList.title: Immediate assistance
benefitProductList.description: Access high-priority 24/7 live chat support from our flight experts
descriptionList: Access high-priority 24/7 live chat support from our flight experts

noteList.text: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 1 hour
Limited to passengers 12 years old and over
Book worry-free. What you see is what you pay.
1 piece per person, 7 kg per piece.
Each piece cannot exceed 40 × 30 × 20 cm in size.
The total weight per person cannot exceed 20 kg.
Each piece cannot exceed 100 × 60 × 40 cm in size.
Free changes to subsequent Spring Airlines flights or involuntary cancellations can be made if flights are canceled or delayed. No other compensations from Spring Airlines.

title.text: $100.80 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made more than 720 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. $126.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made between 720 hour(s) and 360 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. $151.20 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made between 360 hour(s) and 168 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. $176.30 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made between 168 hour(s) and 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. Cancellations are not permitted if made within 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. Cancellation are not permitted after the departure of the first segment.

title.text: $75.60 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made more than 720 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. If made between 168 hour(s) and 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment, date/time changes within the same class are $151.20 per adult ticket. $176.30 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made within 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. $201.50 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made after the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged.
